user.title: Connect a Poem.town clock
user.description: Find your clock's API token under Dashboard → your clock → Web API on poem.town.

data_description.token: The per-clock Bearer token (starts with poem_).
data_description.screen_id: The 40-character screen identifier for your clock.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Poem.town. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token for this clock.
error.invalid_screen_id: The screen ID is invalid. It must be a 40-character identifier.
